displayTitle: Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side
synopsis: ===Boxed set=== Remove the disposable exterior box to reveal the black-and-red pyramid-shaped Sith case. It appears innocuous at first. The Sith have existed in the galaxy for centuries, lurking, waiting for their chance to seize control. As various Sith Lords emerged and rose to power, they recorded their thoughts, exploits, and plots for Sith control of the galaxy. When they fell, their knowledge vanished with them forever. Or so it seemed. . . . Over the years, these writings were passed among numerous Sith and Jedi, who added their comments to the pages. In his quest for domination, Darth
title: Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side
